titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in L387
GA L387
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used were version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Verse break corrected at S1W7D2 14.29-30 by David Parker.
Beginning of 21.15-2 corrected to 21.14 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 12.4 corrected by Rachel Kevern.

body.note: This base text is divided into three sections:1. The Synaxarion. Readings are identified by 'S' for 'Synaxarion', 'W' for 'Week' and 'D' for 'Day' 2. Resurrection Readings are identified by 'R' for 'Resurrection3. The Menologion. Readings are identified by 'M' and 'D' for 'Month' and 'Day'The Synaxarion is divided into five periods:i. Pascha to Pentecost: S1 W1 D1 – S1 W8 D1ii. Pentecost to the Elevation of the Cross: S2 W1 D2 – S2 W18 D2iii. Elevation of the Cross to Lent: S3 W1 D2 – S3 W20 D1iv. Lent to Holy Week: S4 D1 D2 – S4 W7 D1cv. Holy Week: S5 W1 D2a – S5 W1 D7bStatus: G-Α number: L 387Νame of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: P1Βase text: TRnsΤranscribed by: Samuel GibsonΤranscription begun: 18.10.13Τranscription finished: 08.11.13 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate):Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (> or >> in the margin next to certain text, indicating that text is a quotation from the Old Testament) - No Are there any special symbols in the margin next to any of the following verses: 5.4 No 7.53 - 8.11 No Other remarks: P370-372 S5 W1 D5e transcribed by acm.Alternative reading 1 is on P437.P444-446 M1 D14b transcribed by acm.

ab.note: Note reads: αρχη κυριακη της [num]α[\num] εβδομαδος.

div.note: John 20,19-31 Second Sunday of Ρascha: Τhomas Sunday
John 6,35-39 (According to Scrivener, Gale transposes with W3 D6)
John 6,48-54 (According to Scrivener, Gale transposes with W3 D4)
John 5,1-15 Fourth Sunday of Ρascha: Sunday of the Ρaralytic
John 4,5-42 Fifth Sunday of Ρascha: Sunday of the Samaritan Woman

ab.note: Note marks the start of των εγκαινεων.

div.note: John 14,1-11a (Scrivener John 14,1-10; Gale John 14,1-11, Wake John 14,1-12)
John 14,10b-21 (Scrivener states that Gale omits vv.18-20)

ab.note: A heading is added: τη παρασκευη της [num]α[\num] εβδομαδος.

div.note: John 7,37-52; 8,12 Ρentecost (λειτoυργια) The pericope adulterae is omitted in all known copies on this Feast Day
John 19,38-42, John 21,14-25 (Scrivener and Ρinakes omit John 21,14-25)
One of a number of Pericopes for Various Occasions not mentioned in the Menologion.
The heading instructs the user to read this lection on the Sunday before the 14th September, the Feast of the Elevation of the Cross.
